case_title: FIDELITY FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. vs. LATIF, ABDUL et al

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF FIDELITY FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LATIF, ABDUL POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1990 TOYOTA TERCEL, VINE #JT2EL36MOLO555050, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $6,222.16, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $112.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,062.50, PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTERES OF 670.95.
